steps.title: Substitute x = 2 into the function
steps.content:
We need to find $f(2)$ where $f(x) = x^2 + 15$. Substitute $x = 2$:
$$f(2) = 2^2 + 15$$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content:
Evaluate the expression: $2^2 = 4$, so
$$f(2) = 4 + 15 = 19$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
